# Midostaurin 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Midostaurin 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Midostaurin</strong> 目前有 <strong>25 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Midostaurin 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Rydapt is indicated:  in combination with standard daunorubicin and cytarabine induction and high dose cytarabine consolidation chemotherapy, and for patients in complete response followed by Rydapt...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>familial thrombocytosis（98.9%）</li>
<li>reactive thrombocytosis（98.8%）</li>
<li>metastatic melanoma（97.6%）</li>
<li>inverse Klippel-Trenaunay syndrome（97.6%）</li>
<li>thrombocythemia（97.5%）</li>
<li>non-cutaneous melanoma（97.1%）</li>
<li>epithelioid cell melanoma（97.0%）</li>
<li>eyelid melanoma（96.9%）</li>
<li>scrotum melanoma（96.7%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with t(8;21)(q22;q22) translocation（96.4%）</li>
<li>superficial spreading melanoma（96.4%）</li>
<li>lentigo maligna melanoma（96.4%）</li>
<li>CDK4 linked melanoma（96.4%）</li>
<li>acral lentiginous melanoma (disease)（96.4%）</li>
<li>balloon cell malignant melanoma（96.4%）</li>
<li>amelanotic skin melanoma（96.4%）</li>
<li>nodular malignant melanoma（96.4%）</li>
<li>malignant melanoma of the mucosa（96.4%）</li>
<li>choroideremia（96.4%）</li>
<li>acute myeloid leukemia with inv3(p21;q26.2) or t(3;3)(p21;q26.2)（96.4%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/midostaurin/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
